messages.content:
## Routing

- **Tier:** Medium
- **Signals:** review-only PR diff; default merge-blocker filing; no edits
- **Invariant applied:** hands-off review → Medium (never Low)
- **Escalations:** none
- **Open questions:** none

Review · pr · Standard · Pass class: closure-re-review · Escalation: Stayed targeted contextual (closure-re-review; commit-stack archaeology) · Pass: targeted contextual · Filing: merge-blockers only

**Depth:** Standard

Anti-thrash preflight: bare `review vs main`. Tip micro-fix trail on `redirect.ts` after a Full Action pass — provisional theme `query-preservation` via commit-stack archaeology. Classified closure-re-review. Targeted contextual (Standard, 2 members).

## Findings
No merge-blockers in scope.

## Review synthesis
Exit gate green — findings-first output; no Continuity footer; no theme table. No sibling Action theme filed.

arguments.prompt:
Fix-loop: contextual re-review
Theme recovery source: commit-stack archaeology
Pass lane: targeted contextual
Prior themes: theme_id query-preservation
User output: findings-first; Continuity one-liner only if open.
Reject sibling Action themes.
Depth: Standard

Pass class: closure-re-review
Reject fresh Action blocks for adjacent variants unless the root invariant differs.
